headings.text: Relax – Lavender, Rose Geranium & Black Pepper
Wake Me Up – Grapefruit, Lemon, Peppermint & Pine

paragraphs: Shower Steamer

Transform your everyday shower into a spa-like escape with our Upfront Cosmetics Shower Steamer. Perfect for those who prefer showers over baths, this aromatic steam-activated tablet infuses your bathroom with luxurious, therapeutic essential oils — turning even the quickest rinse into a moment of calm.

Simply place the steamer on the floor of your shower, away from direct water flow, and let the gentle splash of droplets release its soothing fragrance. As it dissolves, it fills the air with an immersive scent experience designed to relax the mind, uplift your mood, and elevate your entire routine.
Aromatherapy, simplified: Enjoy the benefits of essential oils without the need for a bath.
Effortless self-care: One tablet delivers a rich, spa-worthy scent experience.
Cleaner beauty: Made with simple, premium ingredients — always vegan and cruelty-free.
Perfect for gifting: A small luxury that brings joy to any shower.
Make your daily ritual something to look forward to. Breathe in, unwind, and let your shower become your sanctuary.
Each of our Shower Steamers is expertly crafted with premium essential oils to elevate your mood, ease discomfort, or give you the boost you need. Choose the blend that speaks to your moment:

Say goodbye to stubborn headaches and tension. Halo blends cooling peppermint with soothing chamomile and invigorating rosemary to help clear your head and restore clarity. Perfect for days when you need relief and a moment of quiet comfort.

Specially crafted for little ones under 10, Inhale Junior offers gentle, kid-safe congestion support. A calming mix of lavender, bright lemon, and soft spearmint creates a comforting steam that helps clear tiny noses — without overwhelming sensitive senses. Perfect for bedtime or stuffy-nose mornings.

When the day feels heavy, Exhale helps you release it all. This refreshing blend mirrors the power of a deep, cleansing breath — cooling, clearing, and rejuvenating. Ideal for resetting after long days, intense workouts, or moments when you just need to let go.

Take the edge off your day with this warm, floral, grounding blend. Relax combines classic lavender with elegant rose geranium and a subtle touch of black pepper for a surprisingly cozy, melt-into-the-floor feeling. Your perfect evening wind-down companion.

Bright, crisp, and energizing — Wake Me Up is sunshine in steamer form. Zesty citrus meets refreshing peppermint and uplifting pine to invigorate your senses and kickstart your morning. Say goodbye to groggy showers and hello to instant motivation.
Hair Oil | Rosemary & Lavender

Formulated with argan oil, rosemary, and other oils, this nourishing oil helps to hydrate, protect, and moisturize hair, reduce breakage and split ends, boost shine and decrease frizziness. It also provides essential vitamins, minerals, and fatty acids to promote flexibility and stronger hair growth.
All our products are proudly handmade in Canada 🇨🇦
Argan - Argan oil can moisturize your hair and scalp and protect your hair from everyday damage. By reducing breakage and split ends and keeping your scalp healthy.
Castor- improve hair’s strength, boost shine and help to reduce frizziness.
Jojoba- Jojoba is rich in vitamins and minerals that nourish and strengthen hair, including vitamin C, B vitamins, vitamin E, copper, and zinc.
Pequi Oil-  highly emollient and is a rich source of essential fatty acids, making it a powerful moisturizer and conditioner that decreases frizz and restores the vitality of brittle hair.

Tomato Seed Oil- improves the quality of dry and brittle hair especially if it has been heat damaged. It locks moisture into the hair shaft, promoting flexibility and improving the conditions for stronger hair growth.
Pomegranate Seed Oil- works effectively on all hair types to hydrate dull, dry strands and to protect against harsh environmental stressors.

Directions: Apply 5-8 drops oil directly to scalp before shampooing. Massage oil directly into your scalp with your finger tips or a scalp massager. Oil should be massaged into scalp for 3-5 minutes for best results. Work from root to tip while applying oil, focusing mainly on your scalp.
For optimal results, leave oil in overnight and wash out the next morning. To achieve best results, oil should be used every-time before shampooing.

Ingredients: Argan Oil, Castor Oil, Jojoba Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Apricot Kernel Oil, Avocado Oil,Grape Seed Oil, Pequi Oil, Tomato Seed Oil, Pomegranate Seed Oil, Rosemary Essential Oil,Lavender Essential Oil & Luxglide.

Each hair oil is housed in a 1 oz frosted glass bottle. The labels are made from paper pulp and such bio-degrade naturally.The labels also do not have any form of lamination which makes them biodegrade much more easily. Each bottle contains 1 fl oz.
ENLIGHTENING Shampoo Bar (Blonde Toner)

Enlightening Shampoo Bar is formulated to eliminate brassiness in light shades of hair.  Blue tansy oil and cool violet tones neutralize unwanted yellowing, promoting bright, cool illumination for blonde hair. This sulphate-free shampoo bar creates an abundant lather that is pH-balanced to be mild, non-irritating and safe for colour-treated hair.
(Previously Blonde Tone Shampoo Bar)
Each 65g bar replaces up to 3 bottles of liquid shampoo.
Recommended for:  Blonde, silver and grey hair colour.
Aroma: Citrus tones with lemongrass undertones.
Usage: Glide bar over wet hair or lather in hands. Massage and scrub into hair to build up a lather. Rinse well. Follow with Enlightening Conditioner Bar.

Ingredients: Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate *CB , Cocamidopropyl Betaine *CB , Sodium Lauryl Sulfoacetate *CB , Behentrimonium Methosulfate *RO, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Seed Butter, Sodium Lactate, Hydrolyzed Oats, Orange Essential Oil , Blue Tansy Essential Oil , Violet # 2 and Geogard.
*CB = Coconut derived cleansing agent, RO = Rapeseed Oil derived conditioning agent
Net Weight : 65g / 2.2oz
Store bar in a dry location.
Free from: Parabens, sulphates, synthetic fragrance, & animal ingredients.
Ultra Shine Hair Mask

Ultra Shine, the revolutionary hair masque that transforms your tresses with the power of nature and innovation. Our just-add-water formula ensures convenience without compromising on quality, offering over 5 indulgent hair masque treatments in every bag. Unveil the secret to radiant, static-free hair with Ultra Shine!
All our products are proudly handmade in Canada 🇨🇦
Key Benefits:

Restore Radiant Shine: Ultra Shine is your ticket to hair that gleams with a lustrous shine. Our carefully curated formula works to revive dull and lackluster strands, leaving you with hair that turns heads.
Banish Hair Static: Tired of dealing with unruly, static-prone hair? Ultra Shine has got you covered. Experience the magic of frizz-free locks that stay smooth and manageable all day long.

Say Goodbye to Split Ends: Bid farewell to split ends and welcome healthier-looking hair. Ultra Shine's advanced formula works to repair and nourish damaged ends, giving you a salon-worthy finish without leaving your home.

Reverse Color Damage: Love experimenting with hair color? Ultra Shine is here to undo the damage caused by color treatments. Revel in vibrant, colored locks without compromising on the health of your hair.

Combat Breakage: Breakage be gone! Our scientifically backed formula includes PhytoCide Aspen Bark Extract Powder, a natural ingredient known for its hair-strengthening properties. Fortify your strands and reduce breakage for resilient, beautiful hair.
Scent Profile: Immerse yourself in the delightful harmony of Lavender and Lemon. The invigorating scent adds a sensory delight to your hair care routine, making each treatment a spa-like experience.
Why Choose Ultra Shine?
Experience the transformative power of Ultra Shine – where science meets nature to give you the hair you've always dreamed of. Elevate your hair care routine and shine on with Ultra Shine!

INGREDIENTS: BTMS-50, BABASSU BUTTER, MANGO BUTTER, ARGAN OIL, AVOCADO OIL, CETYL ALCOHOL, BAOBAB PROTEIN, RICE PROTEIN, PANTHENOL, VITAMIN E, GEOGARD, LEMON ESSENTIAL OIL, LAVENDER ESSENTIAL OIL, ALOE VERA EXTRACT, SACCHARUM OFFICINARUM (SUGAR CANE) EXTRACT & CITRUS LIMON (LEMON) FRUIT EXTRACT & BETAINE & HEXYLENE GLYCOL & PYRUS MALUS (APPLE) FRUIT EXTRACT & CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAF EXTRACT & HEXAPEPTIDE-11 AND HYDROXYPROPYLTRIMONIUM RICE PROTEIN.
The craft paper bags are lined with bio material made from renewable resources such as corn and sugar. It is a sustainable product and is compostable in industrial composting facilities.

DIRECTIONS: Place all  3 Hair Masque cubes in a heat safe container. Add 1.5 cups of just boiled water and add to a heat safe container. Stir cube until its fully dissolved. Masque will be hot. Allow to cool. Apply a liberal amount of roots and tips. Allow to sit for up to 2 hours. Rinse as usual. Store remainder inn airtight jar for up to 24 months. For use weekly to bi-weekly.
HYDRATING  Conditioner Bar

The Hydrating Hemp Conditioner Bar has earthy undertones and is  conditioner that leaves hair silky and shiny without the weight. The concentrated formula features baobab extract, shea and hemp butters, adding substantial hydration that leaves hair silky soft and tangle-free.
All our products are proudly handmade in Canada 🇨🇦
Each 65g bar replaces up to 3 bottles of liquid conditioner.
Recommended for: All hair types.
Aroma:  Earthy undertones with notes of Patchouli, Palmrosa, Cedarwood and Vetiver.
Usage: Glide bar over wet hair or lather in hands. Massage well concentrating on mid-shaft to ends. Rinse well. Pairs well with Hydrating Hemp  Shampoo Bars.

Ingredients:  Ingredients: BTMS-50 *RO ,Cetyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter) Fruit, Cannabis sativa (Hemp) Oil, Cannabis sativa (Hemp Seed) Butter, Hydrolyzed Adansonia Digitata (Baobab) Seed Extract,  Panthenol, Vitamin E, LuxGlide N350 , Cedrus atlantica (Cedarwood) Oil , Pogostemon Cablin (Patchouli) Oil , Cymbopogon martinii var motia (Palmrosa) Oil , Vetiveria Zizanoides (Vetiver) Oil, Cucumis sativus (Cucumber) Extract and Geogard.
*CO = Coconut Oil derived, RO = Rapeseed Oil derived conditioning agent
Net Weight : 65g / 2.2oz
Store bar in a dry location.
Free from: Parabens, sulphates, synthetic fragrance, & animal ingredients.

white shower steamer in a nice fancy shower

Cleaner beauty: Made with simple, premium ingredients — always vegan and cruelty-free.
Perfect for gifting: A small luxury that brings joy to any shower.

paragraphs: Hair Oil | Rosemary & Lavender

Formulated with argan oil, rosemary, and other oils, this nourishing oil helps to hydrate, protect, and moisturize hair, reduce breakage and split ends, boost shine and decrease frizziness. It also provides essential vitamins, minerals, and fatty acids to promote flexibility and stronger hair growth.
All our products are proudly handmade in Canada 🇨🇦
Argan - Argan oil can moisturize your hair and scalp and protect your hair from everyday damage. By reducing breakage and split ends and keeping your scalp healthy.
Castor- improve hair’s strength, boost shine and help to reduce frizziness.
Jojoba- Jojoba is rich in vitamins and minerals that nourish and strengthen hair, including vitamin C, B vitamins, vitamin E, copper, and zinc.
Pequi Oil-  highly emollient and is a rich source of essential fatty acids, making it a powerful moisturizer and conditioner that decreases frizz and restores the vitality of brittle hair.

Tomato Seed Oil- improves the quality of dry and brittle hair especially if it has been heat damaged. It locks moisture into the hair shaft, promoting flexibility and improving the conditions for stronger hair growth.
Pomegranate Seed Oil- works effectively on all hair types to hydrate dull, dry strands and to protect against harsh environmental stressors.

Directions: Apply 5-8 drops oil directly to scalp before shampooing. Massage oil directly into your scalp with your finger tips or a scalp massager. Oil should be massaged into scalp for 3-5 minutes for best results. Work from root to tip while applying oil, focusing mainly on your scalp.
For optimal results, leave oil in overnight and wash out the next morning. To achieve best results, oil should be used every-time before shampooing.

Ingredients: Argan Oil, Castor Oil, Jojoba Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Apricot Kernel Oil, Avocado Oil,Grape Seed Oil, Pequi Oil, Tomato Seed Oil, Pomegranate Seed Oil, Rosemary Essential Oil,Lavender Essential Oil & Luxglide.

Each hair oil is housed in a 1 oz frosted glass bottle. The labels are made from paper pulp and such bio-degrade naturally.The labels also do not have any form of lamination which makes them biodegrade much more easily. Each bottle contains 1 fl oz.
ENLIGHTENING Shampoo Bar (Blonde Toner)

Enlightening Shampoo Bar is formulated to eliminate brassiness in light shades of hair.  Blue tansy oil and cool violet tones neutralize unwanted yellowing, promoting bright, cool illumination for blonde hair. This sulphate-free shampoo bar creates an abundant lather that is pH-balanced to be mild, non-irritating and safe for colour-treated hair.
(Previously Blonde Tone Shampoo Bar)
Each 65g bar replaces up to 3 bottles of liquid shampoo.
Recommended for:  Blonde, silver and grey hair colour.
Aroma: Citrus tones with lemongrass undertones.
Usage: Glide bar over wet hair or lather in hands. Massage and scrub into hair to build up a lather. Rinse well. Follow with Enlightening Conditioner Bar.

Ingredients: Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate *CB , Cocamidopropyl Betaine *CB , Sodium Lauryl Sulfoacetate *CB , Behentrimonium Methosulfate *RO, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Seed Butter, Sodium Lactate, Hydrolyzed Oats, Orange Essential Oil , Blue Tansy Essential Oil , Violet # 2 and Geogard.
*CB = Coconut derived cleansing agent, RO = Rapeseed Oil derived conditioning agent
Net Weight : 65g / 2.2oz
Store bar in a dry location.
Free from: Parabens, sulphates, synthetic fragrance, & animal ingredients.
Ultra Shine Hair Mask

Ultra Shine, the revolutionary hair masque that transforms your tresses with the power of nature and innovation. Our just-add-water formula ensures convenience without compromising on quality, offering over 5 indulgent hair masque treatments in every bag. Unveil the secret to radiant, static-free hair with Ultra Shine!
All our products are proudly handmade in Canada 🇨🇦
Key Benefits:

Restore Radiant Shine: Ultra Shine is your ticket to hair that gleams with a lustrous shine. Our carefully curated formula works to revive dull and lackluster strands, leaving you with hair that turns heads.
Banish Hair Static: Tired of dealing with unruly, static-prone hair? Ultra Shine has got you covered. Experience the magic of frizz-free locks that stay smooth and manageable all day long.

Say Goodbye to Split Ends: Bid farewell to split ends and welcome healthier-looking hair. Ultra Shine's advanced formula works to repair and nourish damaged ends, giving you a salon-worthy finish without leaving your home.

Reverse Color Damage: Love experimenting with hair color? Ultra Shine is here to undo the damage caused by color treatments. Revel in vibrant, colored locks without compromising on the health of your hair.

Combat Breakage: Breakage be gone! Our scientifically backed formula includes PhytoCide Aspen Bark Extract Powder, a natural ingredient known for its hair-strengthening properties. Fortify your strands and reduce breakage for resilient, beautiful hair.
Scent Profile: Immerse yourself in the delightful harmony of Lavender and Lemon. The invigorating scent adds a sensory delight to your hair care routine, making each treatment a spa-like experience.
Why Choose Ultra Shine?
Experience the transformative power of Ultra Shine – where science meets nature to give you the hair you've always dreamed of. Elevate your hair care routine and shine on with Ultra Shine!

INGREDIENTS: BTMS-50, BABASSU BUTTER, MANGO BUTTER, ARGAN OIL, AVOCADO OIL, CETYL ALCOHOL, BAOBAB PROTEIN, RICE PROTEIN, PANTHENOL, VITAMIN E, GEOGARD, LEMON ESSENTIAL OIL, LAVENDER ESSENTIAL OIL, ALOE VERA EXTRACT, SACCHARUM OFFICINARUM (SUGAR CANE) EXTRACT & CITRUS LIMON (LEMON) FRUIT EXTRACT & BETAINE & HEXYLENE GLYCOL & PYRUS MALUS (APPLE) FRUIT EXTRACT & CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAF EXTRACT & HEXAPEPTIDE-11 AND HYDROXYPROPYLTRIMONIUM RICE PROTEIN.
The craft paper bags are lined with bio material made from renewable resources such as corn and sugar. It is a sustainable product and is compostable in industrial composting facilities.

DIRECTIONS: Place all  3 Hair Masque cubes in a heat safe container. Add 1.5 cups of just boiled water and add to a heat safe container. Stir cube until its fully dissolved. Masque will be hot. Allow to cool. Apply a liberal amount of roots and tips. Allow to sit for up to 2 hours. Rinse as usual. Store remainder inn airtight jar for up to 24 months. For use weekly to bi-weekly.

Nature's Touch: Our formula is backed by science and enriched with PhytoCide Aspen Bark Extract Powder for a natural, effective solution to hair concerns.

paragraphs: HYDRATING  Conditioner Bar

The Hydrating Hemp Conditioner Bar has earthy undertones and is  conditioner that leaves hair silky and shiny without the weight. The concentrated formula features baobab extract, shea and hemp butters, adding substantial hydration that leaves hair silky soft and tangle-free.
All our products are proudly handmade in Canada 🇨🇦
Each 65g bar replaces up to 3 bottles of liquid conditioner.
Recommended for: All hair types.
Aroma:  Earthy undertones with notes of Patchouli, Palmrosa, Cedarwood and Vetiver.
Usage: Glide bar over wet hair or lather in hands. Massage well concentrating on mid-shaft to ends. Rinse well. Pairs well with Hydrating Hemp  Shampoo Bars.

Ingredients:  Ingredients: BTMS-50 *RO ,Cetyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter) Fruit, Cannabis sativa (Hemp) Oil, Cannabis sativa (Hemp Seed) Butter, Hydrolyzed Adansonia Digitata (Baobab) Seed Extract,  Panthenol, Vitamin E, LuxGlide N350 , Cedrus atlantica (Cedarwood) Oil , Pogostemon Cablin (Patchouli) Oil , Cymbopogon martinii var motia (Palmrosa) Oil , Vetiveria Zizanoides (Vetiver) Oil, Cucumis sativus (Cucumber) Extract and Geogard.
*CO = Coconut Oil derived, RO = Rapeseed Oil derived conditioning agent
Net Weight : 65g / 2.2oz
Store bar in a dry location.
Free from: Parabens, sulphates, synthetic fragrance, & animal ingredients.

About the Shop
At Upfront, we take pride in knowing where our every ingredient comes from, and we pride ourselves on sourcing the best possible ingredients.
Our shampoo and conditioning bars are 65 grams of nutrient richness without the water weight or the plastic bottle.
